mapper.select: select cp.id, cp.cost_type, cp.item_name, cp.task_id, t.name as task_name, cp.phase_name, cp.planned_amount, cp.currency, cp.remark from cost_plan cp left join project_task t on t.id = cp.task_id where cp.project_id = #{projectId} and cp.is_deleted = 0 order by cp.created_at desc

select cp.id, cp.cost_type, cp.item_name, cp.task_id, t.name as task_name, cp.phase_name, cp.planned_amount, cp.currency, cp.remark from cost_plan cp left join project_task t on t.id = cp.task_id where cp.project_id = #{projectId} and cp.id = #{id} and cp.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update cost_plan set task_id = #{taskId}, cost_type = #{type}, phase_name = #{phase}, item_name = #{name}, planned_amount = #{plannedAmount}, currency = #{currency}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select ca.id, ca.task_id, t.name as task_name, ca.source_type, ca.actual_amount, coalesce(cp.currency, 'CNY') as currency, ca.occurred_date, ca.description from cost_actual ca left join project_task t on t.id = ca.task_id left join cost_plan cp on cp.id = ca.cost_plan_id where ca.project_id = #{projectId} and ca.is_deleted = 0 order by ca.occurred_date desc, ca.id desc

select ca.id, ca.task_id, t.name as task_name, ca.source_type, ca.actual_amount, coalesce(cp.currency, 'CNY') as currency, ca.occurred_date, ca.description from cost_actual ca left join project_task t on t.id = ca.task_id left join cost_plan cp on cp.id = ca.cost_plan_id where ca.project_id = #{projectId} and ca.id = #{id} and ca.is_deleted = 0

select pv, ev, ac, ev - ac as cv, ev - pv as sv, case when ac = 0 then 0 else round(ev / ac, 4) end as cpi, case when pv = 0 then 0 else round(ev / pv, 4) end as spi from ( select coalesce((select sum(cp.planned_amount) from cost_plan cp where cp.project_id = #{projectId} and cp.is_deleted = 0), 0) as pv, coalesce((select sum(cp.planned_amount * coalesce(t.progress, 0) / 100) from cost_plan cp left join project_task t on t.id = cp.task_id and t.is_deleted = 0 where cp.project_id = #{projectId} and cp.is_deleted = 0), 0) as ev, coalesce((select sum(ca.actual_amount) from cost_actual ca where ca.project_id = #{projectId} and ca.is_deleted = 0 and ca.source_type <> 'TIMESHEET'), 0) + coalesce((select sum(ts.labor_cost) from timesheet ts where ts.project_id = #{projectId} and ts.is_deleted = 0), 0) as ac ) metrics
